Invalid block found during conversion:

 - QuantizedReshape > QuantizedFlatten > QuantizedDense > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedConv2D > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedConv2D > QuantizedMaxPool2D > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedConv2D > QuantizedReLU > QuantizedGlobalAveragePooling2D
 - QuantizedConv2DTranspose > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedDepthwiseConv2D > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedDepthwiseConv2D > QuantizedMaxPool2D > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedDepthwiseConv2DTranspose > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedBufferTempConv > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedDepthwiseBufferTempConv > QuantizedReLU
 - QuantizedStatefulProjection > QuantizedStatefulRecurrent > QuantizedExtractToken > QuantizedStatefulProjection > QuantizedReLU
